response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile engineer with a genuine passion for developer tooling — including building test runners, assertion libraries, and contributing to a C IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI) — but the core required stack is largely absent. His professional work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang; Java appears only peripherally, and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, or deep JVM expertise, which are hard requirements for this enterprise JVM tooling role.
strengths: Direct IDE development experience on NI LabWindows/CVI (C/C++)
Authentic developer-tooling track record (test runner, assertion library, web server libraries)
Broad polyglot experience including low-latency, high-scale backend systems
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/enterprise-framework experience
Java exposure is minimal and dated; no evidence of deep JVM internals knowledge
Recent work (TypeScript/Node, AI tooling) is far from the enterprise JVM ecosystem
